title: How to reset your account password
content: Customers can reset their password from the sign-in page by selecting 'Forgot Password'. A secure reset link is sent to the registered email address. The link expires after 30 minutes. Support agents must never ask customers to provide their current password.
search_text: How to reset your account password. Customers can reset their password from the sign-in page by selecting 'Forgot Password'. A secure reset link is sent to the registered email address. The link expires after 30 minutes. Support agents must never ask customers to provide their current password. Category: account_access. Tags: login password security

title: Refund and return policy
content: Customers may request a refund within 30 days of purchase when the product meets the return conditions. Approved refunds are sent to the original payment method and normally take five to ten business days to appear.
search_text: Refund and return policy. Customers may request a refund within 30 days of purchase when the product meets the return conditions. Approved refunds are sent to the original payment method and normally take five to ten business days to appear. Category: refunds. Tags: payment refund return

title: Delayed order investigation process
content: When an order is delayed, verify the tracking number and the latest carrier scan. If no tracking update appears for more than 72 hours, open a carrier investigation and provide the customer with a case reference.
search_text: Delayed order investigation process. When an order is delayed, verify the tracking number and the latest carrier scan. If no tracking update appears for more than 72 hours, open a carrier investigation and provide the customer with a case reference. Category: shipping. Tags: delivery shipping tracking

title: Resolving duplicate charges
content: A duplicate charge may be a temporary authorization or a completed payment. Agents should compare transaction identifiers before issuing a refund. Temporary authorizations usually disappear within seven business days.
search_text: Resolving duplicate charges. A duplicate charge may be a temporary authorization or a completed payment. Agents should compare transaction identifiers before issuing a refund. Temporary authorizations usually disappear within seven business days. Category: billing. Tags: billing charge duplicate

title: Unlocking a locked customer account
content: An account may be locked after multiple failed login attempts. Customers should wait fifteen minutes before retrying or use the password reset flow. Identity verification is required before an agent manually unlocks an account.
search_text: Unlocking a locked customer account. An account may be locked after multiple failed login attempts. Customers should wait fifteen minutes before retrying or use the password reset flow. Identity verification is required before an agent manually unlocks an account. Category: account_access. Tags: account locked security

title: Cancelling a subscription
content: Customers can cancel a subscription from the billing settings page. Cancellation stops future renewals but access remains available until the end of the current billing period. Previous charges are governed by the refund policy.
search_text: Cancelling a subscription. Customers can cancel a subscription from the billing settings page. Cancellation stops future renewals but access remains available until the end of the current billing period. Previous charges are governed by the refund policy. Category: subscriptions. Tags: cancel renewal subscription

title: Updating a shipping address
content: A shipping address can be changed only before the order enters fulfillment. After fulfillment begins, the customer must contact the carrier or request a return after delivery. Agents must verify the order number before changes.
search_text: Updating a shipping address. A shipping address can be changed only before the order enters fulfillment. After fulfillment begins, the customer must contact the carrier or request a return after delivery. Agents must verify the order number before changes. Category: shipping. Tags: address order shipping

title: Two-factor authentication support
content: Customers who cannot access their authenticator application may use a saved recovery code. If recovery codes are unavailable, support must complete the identity verification workflow before disabling two-factor authentication.
search_text: Two-factor authentication support. Customers who cannot access their authenticator application may use a saved recovery code. If recovery codes are unavailable, support must complete the identity verification workflow before disabling two-factor authentication. Category: security. Tags: 2fa authentication security

title: API rate limit guidance
content: API requests are limited according to the customer's service plan. Applications receiving HTTP 429 responses should use exponential backoff and inspect the rate-limit response headers before retrying.
search_text: API rate limit guidance. API requests are limited according to the customer's service plan. Applications receiving HTTP 429 responses should use exponential backoff and inspect the rate-limit response headers before retrying. Category: technical. Tags: api developer rate-limit

title: Requesting a personal data export
content: Customers may request an export of their personal data from the privacy settings page. The request requires account verification and may take up to thirty days. The download link is time-limited and must not be shared.
search_text: Requesting a personal data export. Customers may request an export of their personal data from the privacy settings page. The request requires account verification and may take up to thirty days. The download link is time-limited and must not be shared. Category: privacy. Tags: data export privacy
